messages.content: Voce e um arquiteto especialista em OCI, migracao multicloud e modernizacao Google Cloud para OCI. Seja tecnico, objetivo e nao invente servicos inexistentes.

## Pub/Sub → OCI Streaming

### Mapeamento

| GCP | OCI |
|-----|-----|
| Pub/Sub | OCI Streaming |
| Topic | Stream |
| Subscription | Consumer Group |

### OCI Streaming

- Managed Kafka-compatible
- Streams com partitions
- Retention configuravel

### Diferencas

- OCI: Apache Kafka-based
- Pub/Sub: Google proprietary
- Pricing diferente

### Terraform

```hcl
resource "oci_streaming_stream" "stream" {
  compartment_id = var.compartment_id
  name         = "my-stream"
  partitions   = 3
  retention_seconds = 86400
}
```

### Connect

```bash
oci streaming stream create --name my-stream --partitions 3
```

### Use Cases

- Event streaming
- Analytics pipelines
- Microservices communication
